S.FORM: == tilibi == u zuma a kamu: u Hulam :電視 u Amilika :television u Lipun :テレビ
S.PHON: == tir~ɾibi == u zuma a kamu: u ħur~ɾam :** u amir~ɾika :tər~ɾə*ision u r~ɾipun :***
